title: Chthonia prostrata
intro: Chthonia prostrata is a plant species, also known as 'Prostrate Chthonia', that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in alleviating symptoms of various conditions, such as arthritis and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Chthonia prostrata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Chthonia prostrata is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to address a range of health concerns and to promote overall well-being.
